brief: Northstar Clinic wants a JSON workflow that classifies inbound support tickets into one of four labels: billing, login, bug, or other. They have a fixed budget of $100 and need it this week.
reference: A correct deliverable is a JSON workflow whose rules map ticket keywords to exactly the four labels billing, login, bug, and other. It must not claim SOC2/HIPAA compliance or real-time capability, which this business cannot provide.
